title: ocotea eggersiana
intro: Ocotea eggersiana, also known as Prune de Chine or Hawaiian Sandalwood, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ocotea eggersiana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Ocotea eggersiana include essential oils and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to promote overall well-being.
